category_sources: Official GitHub README describes clip as a command line illustration processor for charts and data-driven illustrations.
source_facts.description says it creates high-quality charts from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and official docs site title use clip.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to clip-lang.org as full documentation and examples.
Official clip-lang.org page is labeled Documentation and User Guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/asmuth/clip, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says clip creates charts and data-driven illustrations and exports SVG in examples.
